allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,3001,2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{N='Process';E={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N='RunTimeMin';E={[math]::Round\(\(\(Get-Date\) - $_.StartTime\).TotalMinutes,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 17304 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,3001,2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table LocalPort, OwningProcess -AutoSize; "---remaining-node-after-our-work-started-10am---"; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date "10:00:00"\) } | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date "10:00:00"\) } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "---node-procs-now---"; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count; "---ports-clear---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,3001,2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date "10:25:00"\) } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "---ports-clear---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,3001,2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize; "---OK-if-empty---")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date "10:30:00"\) } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "---ports---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,3001,2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date "10:40:00"\) } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "---ports---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,3001,2567 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date "10:40:00"\) } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "ok")
